SPECIMEN — THE RAIL GOES LIVE WITH THE WIRE
SPEED
—
THE WEAVE, LIVE — five throughlines flow as it weaves: belief (ground) · possession (fine cord) · pressure (bold cord) · tempo (rail) · crowd (selvages). EVENTS ARE THE THREADS REACTING — a goal is a gold weft + the belief snap + the pressure surge, not a stamp. The bare warp below the shuttle is the match not yet woven. Live-ready: the coordinator wires a match into window.__loom and this weaves it live.
